file-name-snake-case.note: DEAD RULE — count equals every PascalCase component + camelCase module in src/** (the project's real convention), so it grows with the codebase. Retired in Phase 5 in favor of @typescript-eslint/naming-convention; the audit runner reports it as informational only. NEVER rename a file to satisfy it. Count synchronized to the 2026-07-16 post-merge workspace snapshot for accurate reporting.

file-too-long.note: src/** files over 800 code lines (blank/comment lines skipped). Exact count synchronized on 2026-07-17 after upstream integration; --check rejects both increases and stale headroom. Avoid splitting cohesive parsers/solvers only to satisfy the counter.

function-too-long.note: Function bodies over 200 code lines in src/**. Exact count synchronized on 2026-07-16 (post-merge re-sync); ratchet down when a function has a clean ownership split.

function-too-complex.note: Cyclomatic complexity over 20 in src/**. Parser/solver heavy; ratchet down only.

too-many-params.note: Functions with more than 4 params in src/**. Exact count synchronized on 2026-07-16 (post-merge re-sync). Prefer an options object; ratchet down only.

too-deep.note: Block nesting deeper than 4 in src/**. Ratchet down only.

nullable-undefined-type-alias.note: Historical top-level type aliases with null or undefined unions.

dynamic-code-execution.note: Historical browser test helper callbacks using new Function.

css-important.note: Historical Tailwind utility font-size overrides and scrollbar styling.

css-declaration-order.note: CSS declaration ordering was cleaned up on 2026-07-05; keep at zero.
